Patterns Documentation
======================

Purpose
-------
This section captures reusable architecture patterns that can be implemented across RTOSes.

Pattern Template
----------------
Each pattern page should include:
- Problem statement
- Constraints and assumptions
- Recommended structure
- Failure modes and mitigations
- Validation checklist

Planned Pages
-------------
- ``producer_consumer.rst``
- ``state_machine_tasks.rst``
- ``command_dispatcher.rst``
- ``periodic_scheduler.rst``
- ``watchdog_fault_handling.rst``
